final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a sci-fi space scene with an astronaut floating in Earth orbit (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a "科幻太空" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 2001: A Space Odyssey cinematic palette, NASA Apollo mission photography, contemporary space-art concept illustration tradition; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours — must include the astronaut as focal subject, partial space station structure at frame edges
Subject: must include an astronaut in detailed spacesuit (one), Earth orbit context
Scene/backdrop: must include Earth below, brilliant Milky Way and nebula in deep space background, partial space station structure at frame edges
Lighting/mood: needs a majestic, awe-inspiring atmosphere — light source must be Earth reflection illuminating the astronaut; exact light quality is yours
Color palette: needs a cosmic direction — exact stellar color balance is yours
Materials/textures: must include detailed spacesuit surface treatment — exact material sheen is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
